mapper.select: SELECT thja.*, vhi.hr_nm, toi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, jbrp.jbrp_id, jbrp.jbrp_nm, vhi2.hr_nm as backup_hr_nm, vhi.user_id FROM esg.tb_hse_job_assignment thja LEFT JOIN esg.v_hr_info vhi on vhi.hr_id = thja.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = vhi.orgn_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = vhi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} LEFT JOIN esg.v_hr_info vhi2 on vhi2.hr_id = thja.backup_hr_id WHERE thja.comp_id = #{compId} AND thja.write_year = #{writeYear} AND thja.doc_no = #{docNo} AND thja.doc_type = #{docType}

SELECT thja.*, vhi.hr_nm, toi.orgn_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm, vhi2.hr_nm as backup_hr_nm, ( SELECT count(*) FROM esg.tb_task_manager_detail ttmd WHERE ttmd.task_detail_user_id = vhi.user_id AND ttmd.comp_id = #{compId} AND to_char(ttmd.req_dt, 'YYYYMMDD') like #{writeYear}||'%' AND ttmd.complete_dt IS null AND ttmd.cancel_dt IS null AND ttmd.use_yn = 'Y' ) as not_completed_cnt FROM esg.tb_hse_job_assignment thja LEFT JOIN esg.v_hr_info vhi on vhi.hr_id = thja.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = vhi.orgn_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = vhi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} LEFT JOIN esg.v_hr_info vhi2 on vhi2.hr_id = thja.backup_hr_id WHERE thja.comp_id = #{compId} AND vhi.hr_id = #{hrId} ORDER BY thja.use_yn DESC, thja.doc_no DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_hse_job_assignment WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_hse_job_assignment ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, hr_id, backup_hr_id, assign_task, use_yn, comp_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{hrId}, #{backupHrId}, #{assignTask}, COALESCE(#{useYn},'N'), #{compId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
